name: Silent Beach
description: A hidden beach with golden sand, palm trees, gentle waves, and very few visitors. Ideal for solitude, reflection, sunset walks, photography, and escaping busy tourist areas.

name: Cinnamon Life
description: A luxury city escape with modern architecture, refined interiors, calm seating areas, skyline views, restaurants, and a premium atmosphere. Good for feeling inspired, relaxing after stress, working, or enjoying a peaceful high-end city mood.

name: Rekawa Beach
description: A long natural beach known for peaceful surroundings, ocean air, turtle nesting areas, and quiet sunsets. Good for slow walks, nature, and escaping noise.

name: Ussangoda
description: A dramatic red-earth landscape overlooking the ocean. One of Sri Lanka's most unusual and cinematic places, good for photography, sunsets, and feeling far from normal life.

name: Galle Fort
description: A historic coastal town with cafés, ocean views, colonial architecture, boutique shops, and beautiful evening walks. Good for slow exploring, photos, food, and aesthetic city-coast energy.

name: Haputale
description: A cool mountain town surrounded by tea estates, mist, and wide views. Perfect for reflection, quiet nature, fresh air, and escaping heat and city noise.

name: Lipton's Seat
description: A famous viewpoint surrounded by tea estates and mountain scenery. Best for sunrise, cool air, panoramic views, photography, and peaceful thinking.

name: Ohiya
description: A quiet mountain village with cold air, forest surroundings, mist, and a peaceful lonely feeling. Good for escaping busy life and being close to nature.

name: Sinharaja Forest
description: A rainforest area filled with greenery, birds, streams, and deep natural energy. Good for a mental reset, nature walks, and feeling away from the modern world.

name: Lotus Tower View Area
description: A modern Colombo city-view location with skyline lights, urban energy, and a reflective night atmosphere. Good for city photography, views, and feeling connected to modern Colombo.

name: Shangri-La Colombo
description: A polished ocean-facing luxury hotel with elegant interiors, sea views, fine dining, and a formal international atmosphere.

name: ITC Ratnadipa
description: A refined ultra-luxury hotel with dramatic architecture, polished interiors, premium hospitality, and a calm executive atmosphere.

name: Galle Face Hotel
description: A historic oceanfront hotel with colonial charm, sunset views, old-world elegance, and a nostalgic Colombo atmosphere.

name: Café Kumbuk
description: A cozy café with healthy food, earthy interiors, relaxed brunch energy, and a soft creative atmosphere.

name: Ministry of Crab
description: An iconic seafood restaurant inside a historic setting, known for premium crab dishes, celebration dinners, and high-end Colombo dining.

name: Monsoon Colombo
description: A colourful modern Asian restaurant with lively social energy, creative dishes, cocktails, and a stylish casual-luxury atmosphere.

name: Nihonbashi
description: A refined Japanese restaurant with calm interiors, precise food, quiet service, and a serious culinary atmosphere.

name: The Kip
description: A minimalist boutique hotel surrounded by tropical gardens, designed for slow living, creativity, and peaceful escapes. Its modern architecture, quiet atmosphere, yoga spaces, and cozy pool create an ideal environment for relaxation, remote work, and mindful mornings.

name: Cape Weligama
description: A world-class luxury clifftop resort overlooking the Indian Ocean. Elegant villas, infinity pools, breathtaking sunsets, and exceptional service create an unforgettable atmosphere for romance, celebration, and peaceful luxury.

name: Palm Hotel
description: A stylish tropical boutique hotel surrounded by palm trees and relaxed coastal vibes. Known for its beautiful pool area, calm atmosphere, and modern interiors, it is perfect for travelers seeking comfort without crowds.

name: The Doctors House
description: A beautifully restored colonial home transformed into one of Sri Lanka's most unique cafés, restaurants, and live music venues. During the day it feels peaceful and artistic, while evenings become vibrant with music, great food, and friendly conversations.

name: Nomad Cafe
description: A cozy café popular with digital nomads, surfers, and creatives. Excellent specialty coffee, healthy breakfasts, fast Wi-Fi, and a calm atmosphere make it one of the best places in southern Sri Lanka for both work and relaxation.

name: Park Street Mews
description: A stylish urban dining street with restaurants, lights, music, and a relaxed social atmosphere for evenings out.

name: Barefoot Garden Cafe
description: A colourful garden café with artistic energy, calm outdoor seating, books, textiles, music, and a creative Colombo atmosphere.

name: The Gallery Café
description: A stylish restaurant inside the former office of architect Geoffrey Bawa, with courtyard seating, art, calm lighting, and refined Colombo dining energy.

name: King of the Mambo
description: A lively oceanfront restaurant and bar with Latin-inspired energy, music, cocktails, sea breeze, and a vibrant night-out atmosphere.

name: Tintagel Colombo
description: A private boutique hotel with historic character, quiet luxury, elegant interiors, and a secluded atmosphere away from the busy city mood.

name: Ceylon Tea Moments
description: A relaxed tea café with Sri Lankan tea culture, soft seating, desserts, casual conversations, and a comfortable city break atmosphere.

name: One Galle Face Mall
description: A premium oceanfront mall with restaurants, shopping, cafés, city views, and a polished urban atmosphere for casual luxury and social time.

name: Colombo City Centre
description: A modern urban mall in the heart of Colombo with restaurants, cafés, shops, cinema access, city energy, and a polished indoor atmosphere. Good for casual hangouts, shopping, food, and escaping heat or rain while staying in a lively city setting.

name: Kandy City Centre
description: A central shopping mall in Kandy with restaurants, retail shops, cafés, city views, and easy access to the lake and temple area. Good for casual shopping, food stops, family outings, and taking a break during a Kandy city day.

name: Royal Botanic Gardens
description: Sri Lanka's most famous botanical garden featuring giant trees, orchid collections, palm avenues, riverside walks, tropical plants, and peaceful green landscapes perfect for nature lovers.

name: Dehiwala National Zoo
description: Sri Lanka's largest zoological garden featuring elephants, lions, reptiles, tropical birds, marine life, and spacious walking paths. Ideal for families, animal lovers, photography, and spending an entire day exploring wildlife.

name: Pedro Tea Estate
description: A beautiful working tea estate surrounded by rolling green hills, mist, fresh mountain air, and panoramic views. Visitors can tour the factory, enjoy peaceful walks, and experience authentic Sri Lankan tea culture.

name: Ridiyagama Safari Park
description: Sri Lanka's largest safari park where visitors drive through open habitats to see lions, zebras, giraffes, elephants, ostriches, bears, and many other animals. Perfect for wildlife lovers, families, photographers, and adventurous day trips.

name: Hakgala Botanical Garden
description: A cool-climate botanical garden famous for roses, orchids, giant trees, mountain scenery, and peaceful walking paths. One of the most beautiful gardens in Sri Lanka.

name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
description: A luxury safari lodge bordering Yala National Park where wildlife, nature, and comfort meet. Guests often see wild boar, deer, monkeys, and exotic birds around the hotel while enjoying peaceful forest surroundings.

name: Kandy Lake
description: A peaceful lake in the heart of Kandy surrounded by mountains, temples, trees, and walking paths. Perfect for evening strolls, reflection, photography, and escaping the busy streets nearby.

name: Diyaluma Falls
description: Sri Lanka's second-highest waterfall with dramatic cliffs, natural infinity pools, breathtaking mountain views, and crystal-clear water. A perfect destination for adventure, photography, swimming, and escaping into nature.

name: Viharamahadevi Park
description: Colombo's largest public park featuring wide green lawns, flowering trees, walking paths, fountains, birds, and peaceful spaces ideal for relaxing in the middle of the city.

name: Mount Lavinia Hotel
description: A historic colonial beachfront hotel famous for its ocean views, elegant architecture, seaside dining, romantic sunsets, and timeless Sri Lankan charm.

name: Diyatha Uyana
description: A beautiful lakeside urban park with walking paths, gardens, food stalls, fountains, and evening lights. Popular for peaceful walks, families, couples, photography, and relaxing after work.

name: Cafe Social
description: A stylish café and restaurant known for specialty coffee, modern interiors, brunch, desserts, and a welcoming atmosphere. Great for remote work, catching up with friends, or a relaxed date.

name: Brief Garden
description: A magical landscaped garden created by Bevis Bawa featuring sculptures, tropical plants, hidden pathways, art, and peaceful corners. Perfect for creative minds, photographers, and anyone seeking tranquility surrounded by nature and design.

name: The Habitat Kosgoda
description: A peaceful boutique beachfront hotel with modern tropical architecture, direct beach access, infinity pool, and a quiet atmosphere ideal for couples and travelers seeking relaxation away from crowds.

name: Kandalama Lake
description: A peaceful lakeside destination surrounded by forests, birds, mountains, and calm waters. Ideal for quiet reflection, sunrise photography, kayaking, and escaping busy tourist areas.

name: Smoke & Bitters
description: An award-winning cocktail bar and restaurant hidden among tropical gardens near Hiriketiya Beach. Famous for creative cocktails, wood-fired cuisine, intimate lighting, and one of Sri Lanka's most unique dining experiences.

name: Amangalla
description: A world-renowned luxury heritage hotel inside Galle Fort offering elegant suites, tranquil courtyards, colonial architecture, fine dining, and one of the most peaceful luxury experiences in Sri Lanka.

name: Cargills Food City One Galle Face
description: A premium supermarket inside One Galle Face Mall offering local and international products, gourmet foods, fresh bakery items, and convenient shopping in a modern setting.

name: The Pekoe Trail
description: Sri Lanka's long-distance hiking trail connecting tea estates, forests, mountain villages, waterfalls, viewpoints, and colonial towns. Perfect for nature lovers, hikers, photographers, and those seeking slow travel experiences.

name: Galle Face Green
description: Sri Lanka's most famous oceanfront promenade where locals and visitors gather to watch sunsets, enjoy street food, fly kites, exercise, and relax beside the Indian Ocean.

name: Water's Edge
description: A luxury lakeside hotel and leisure destination featuring elegant restaurants, walking paths, gardens, event spaces, and peaceful lake views just outside central Colombo.

name: The Commons Coffee House
description: A modern café in Colombo known for specialty coffee, artisan pastries, all-day brunch, and a relaxed atmosphere. Popular among students, professionals, digital nomads, and anyone looking for quality coffee in a stylish setting.

name: Negombo Lagoon
description: A scenic lagoon famous for boat rides, mangroves, birdlife, fishing communities, sunsets, and peaceful waters. A wonderful destination for nature lovers and photographers looking for a quieter coastal experience.

name: Pigeon Island National Park
description: Sri Lanka's most famous marine national park with crystal-clear water, colorful coral reefs, blacktip reef sharks, sea turtles, and outstanding snorkeling just off Nilaveli Beach.

name: Flying Ravana Mega Zipline
description: One of Sri Lanka's longest and fastest ziplines, soaring above lush tea estates with spectacular mountain views. Ideal for thrill seekers looking for an unforgettable adventure in Ella.
